side_missions.title: Clean Up Aisle Seven
side_missions.description: Goblin Scrapper raiders have been ambushing merchant convoys near the Asteroid Belt. The Felid Corsairs want them dealt with — permanently.

side_missions.title: Lost in Transit
side_missions.description: A shipment of rare alloys vanished between realms. The Canis League suspects pirates, but the cargo manifest tells a different story. Track it down before anyone else does.

objectives.description: Return the cargo to the contact

side_missions.title: Wings of Diplomacy
side_missions.description: A Fairy Collective envoy needs safe passage through contested space. The pay is good, but crossing the Lions' patrol routes could be costly.

objectives.description: Escort the Fairy envoy through Lion territory

side_missions.title: Ghost Ship
side_missions.description: Sensors picked up a derelict drifting in the outer reaches. No life signs. No distress beacon. Just a hull full of salvage — and probably a reason nobody claimed it yet.

objectives.description: Board and search the derelict vessel
